wine_hotels.name: Hotel Bodega Tio Pepe
wine_hotels.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 5-star boutique hotel within Gonzalez Byass bodega complex
wine_hotels.description: Opened in 2020 inside the Gonzalez Byass bodega complex, Hotel Bodega Tio Pepe is an immersive sherry-hotel concept. Rooms are set in restored winery buildings within the working cellar grounds; guests have direct access to the La Concha tasting room and evening bodega walks.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Daily bodega walks before sunset; Tio Pepe aperitif included at check-in; VORS private tasting for hotel guests; in-house sherry sommelier

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Casa Palacio Maria Luisa
wine_hotels.address: Calle Torneria 22, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.description: An 18th-century palace in central Jerez converted into a boutique hotel. The Maria Luisa offers curated sherry programmes through its concierge; guests are guided to local tabancos and bodegas with personalised tasting routes across the Marco de Jerez.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Concierge-arranged bodega visits; sherry aperitif on arrival; tabanco walking-tour packages; wine-pairing dinners on request

verified.address_quoted: C/ Torneria, 22, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Las Cortes de Cadiz
wine_hotels.category: 4-star boutique hotel in Cadiz historic centre
wine_hotels.description: A restored 19th-century building in Cadiz's old city, the Las Cortes hotel serves as a wine-tourism base for visits across the Marco de Jerez triangle. The hotel bar stocks an extensive sherry list and the concierge runs structured Jerez day trips.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel bar with 40-label Jerez DO sherry list; guided day excursions to Jerez, Sanlucar and El Puerto; sherry and local gin aperitif programme

wine_hotels.name: Posada de Palacio
wine_hotels.address: Calle Caballeros 11, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_hotels.description: A historic posada in the heart of Sanlucar de Barrameda, positioned within walking distance of the main Manzanilla bodegas. The Posada de Palacio provides direct access to Hidalgo, Barbadillo and La Guita cellar visits and the riverside seafood bars of the Bajo de Guia.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Manzanilla tasting on arrival; bodega-visit booking service; Bajo de Guia seafood and sherry evening walking route

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Duques de Medinaceli
wine_hotels.address: Plaza de los Jazmines 2, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
wine_hotels.description: Set in the 17th-century Palacio Medinaceli in El Puerto de Santa Maria, this hotel is the base for exploring Osborne bodega and Aponiente restaurant from the Atlantic coast corner of the sherry triangle. The hotel bar carries an Osborne sherry list.
wine_hotels.wine_program: In-house Osborne sherry list; concierge booking for Aponiente and Osborne bodega visits; day excursions to Jerez and Sanlucar

verified.address_quoted: Plaza de los Jazmines, 2, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Palacio Garvey
wine_hotels.address: Calle Torneria 24, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star boutique hotel in restored 18th-century bodega family palace
wine_hotels.description: Housed in the restored palace of the Garvey sherry family, one of Jerez's oldest sherry dynasties. The hotel retains original architectural features from the 18th-century bodega era and offers a personal connection to the history of the Marco de Jerez sherry trade.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Historical sherry trade orientation on arrival; guided walk to adjacent tabancos and bodegas; bodega booking service for nearby Lustau and Tradicion

verified.address_quoted: C/ Torneria, 24, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hacienda El Recreo
wine_hotels.address: Carretera Jerez-Medina Sidonia km 7, 11406 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural country house hotel in vineyard setting
wine_hotels.description: A traditional Andalusian hacienda set in albariza vineyard land outside Jerez. Guests are surrounded by the white chalk soils of the Jerez DO; the property arranges private vineyard walks and tasting visits to nearby bodegas in the Jerez heartland.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Vineyard walks on the surrounding albariza terroir; sherry-on-arrival from adjacent bodegas; private tasting visit bookings to Tradicion, Maestro Sierra and Valdespino

verified.address_quoted: Ctra Jerez-Medina Sidonia km 7, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Sherry Park
wine_hotels.address: Avenida Alvaro Domecq 11bis, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star hotel in the Jerez wine district
wine_hotels.description: A large 4-star hotel in the Jerez wine district, positioned between the major bodegas and the Royal Andalusian School of Equestrian Art. The Hotel Sherry Park hosts wine-focused package stays incorporating bodega visits and flamenco shows.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel bar with 25-label Jerez DO list; sherry-tour package bookings; flamenco and bodega combination evenings for groups

verified.address_quoted: Avda. Alvaro Domecq, 11bis, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Argantonio
wine_hotels.category: 3-star boutique hotel in Cadiz historic centre
wine_hotels.description: A boutique hotel in the Andalusian-Moorish heart of Cadiz old city, within easy reach of the Atlantic ferry to El Puerto de Santa Maria. The Argantonio concierge offers structured sherry-tourism routes across the Marco de Jerez as a two-day-from-Cadiz option.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Sherry welcome drink; tabanco and bodega route planning; half-day Jerez sherry triangle excursion bookings

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Jerez and Spa
wine_hotels.address: Avenida Alvaro Domecq 35, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 5-star hotel and spa in the Jerez wine district
wine_hotels.description: The five-star Hotel Jerez is the principal luxury accommodation in the Jerez wine district, with a sherry-focused bar and a regular calendar of bodega-visit packages. The hotel is the meeting point for premium wine-tourism groups visiting the major Jerez houses.
wine_hotels.wine_program: In-house sherry bar with 50+ Jerez DO labels; bodega-excursion concierge service; private tutored tasting dinners in the hotel's event suite

verified.address_quoted: Avda. Alvaro Domecq, 35, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Dona Blanca
wine_hotels.address: Calle Mora 1, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star hotel in El Puerto de Santa Maria
wine_hotels.description: A 4-star hotel in El Puerto de Santa Maria, serving as the Atlantic-coast base for sherry tourism and visits to the Osborne bodega and the Aponiente restaurant. The hotel bar is stocked with Osborne sherry expressions and local Cadiz wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Osborne sherry welcome; Aponiente reservation assistance; Jerez sherry-triangle day-tour bookings

verified.address_quoted: C/ Mora, 1, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

wine_hotels.name: Solar de los Timoteos
wine_hotels.address: Calle Moral 1, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_hotels.description: A restored 18th-century family palace in the historic centre of Jerez, steps from the major tabancos and bodega entrances. The Solar de los Timoteos offers personalised sherry-tourism services including private tabanco visits at opening hours and concierge-arranged bodega tours.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Sherry aperitif on arrival; private tabanco walking route; concierge-arranged bodega and VORS tasting visits

verified.address_quoted: C/ Moral, 1, Jerez de la Frontera
